name: update_memory
description:
Replace a memory's full body. Caller is responsible for keeping the H1 title intact (or accept that the title shifts to the new H1).
For incremental additions, prefer `append_to_memory` so you don't accidentally drop existing wikilinks.

identifier.description: Memory title, filename, or absolute path.

body.description: Full new markdown body. Replaces whatever was there.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
